market_regime.interpretation: Put walls are temporary support (breakdown likely). Call walls are strong resistance. Gamma flip acts as dynamic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected. Highly positive total GEX (8.38B) suppresses market movement and pins price tightly near the 675 Gamma Flip.
outlook.summary: The market is heavily dominated by positive dealer gamma, creating a suppressing effect on volatility. Spot is pinned exactly at the 0DTE Gamma Flip (675.05) and immediate Call Wall resistance. Extremely high Put/Call ratios across all tenors and a persistent bearish smirk skew indicate heavy hedging activity. With structural Max Pain clustered well below spot between 656-663, market makers have a strong incentive to defend calls at current levels, creating a gravitational pull lower toward the 660 friction zone.

levels.motivazione: Spot is trading precisely at the 0DTE Gamma Flip equilibrium. This marks the exact threshold where dealer positioning shifts from short to long gamma, dictating intraday pinning behavior.
Major structural resistance with massive Call OI across 0DTE (8,222), WEEKLY (21,294), and MONTHLY (21,566). High volatility ratio confirms strong defensive selling by market makers.
Massive structural magnet aligned with the 656-663 Max Pain cluster. High Put OI in WEEKLY (34,940) and MONTHLY (27,990) combined with 0DTE Call OI (30,115) creates intense gamma friction.
Ultimate downside support with extreme Put OI in MONTHLY (69,094), WEEKLY (24,157), and 0DTE (19,004). Bearish smirk skew reinforces this as a deeply defended institutional anchor.
Significant upper bound structural ceiling with heavy Call OI in MONTHLY (36,159) and WEEKLY (13,479). Caps any extreme upside breakout attempts for the current series.
Deep institutional support with massive Put OI in WEEKLY (56,010), MONTHLY (38,442), and 0DTE (19,810). Valid extreme bearish target validated by heavy bearish skew.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Massive Call OI and Volume in 0DTE (17k OI, 135k Vol) and WEEKLY (4.3k OI, 45k Vol), backed by strong MONTHLY OI (19k). Dealers will aggressively hedge against upward breaks.
RESONANCE: High concentration of Call and Put OI across all expirations (0DTE: 21k Call OI, WEEKLY: 9.9k Call/4.8k Put OI, MONTHLY: 47k Call/36k Put OI). Primary pinning point.
CONFLUENCE: Significant Put OI and Volume in both WEEKLY (9.4k OI, 34k Vol) and MONTHLY (29k OI). Acts as a strong structural floor near the Weekly Max Pain (585).
MONTHLY Gamma Flip level. A breach above this shifts the monthly dealer gamma profile negative, likely triggering an acceleration of volatility and dynamic hedging selling.
SINGLE EXPIRY (0DTE): Extreme intraday Call volume (210k) creates a local short-term friction zone just below the major 610 structural wall.
CONFLUENCE: Strong Put OI in WEEKLY (6.8k) and MONTHLY (13k). Closely aligned with the Monthly Max Pain (590) and Weekly Max Pain (585) creating a strong downside magnet and defense zone.
